response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title 'PHOENIX PRAYER' and composer Miku Nakamura from on-screen text at 00:37. Identified performer as Omaru Polka from the hashtag '#尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026'. Searched for 'PHOENIX PRAYER 中村未来 Japanese and English lyrics' and found matching lyrics from multiple sources.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song 'PHOENIX PRAYER' by virtual YouTuber Omaru Polka and a guest performer, held during the '#尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026' (Omaru Polka Birthday Festival 2026).

scenes.description: Virtual characters Omaru Polka and a guest perform the song 'PHOENIX PRAYER' on a stage with neon lighting, with the title and composer credits appearing on screen at the beginning of the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
劫々とつづくショートショート
喪失は絶対零度だ
今夜はリィンカーネーション
哀しみが混沌の子守唄うたってるよ
運命に理由があるのならば
すべてを賭けてみたいの
あなたを守りたい
どこまでも高く飛べるわ
どこまでも
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A short story that goes on and on
Loss is absolute zero
Tonight is a reincarnation
Sorrow is singing a lullaby of chaos
If there's a reason for fate
I want to risk it all
I want to protect you
I can fly as high as I want
As far as I want
